# CWE-1236 safe: CSV cells escaped against formulas
lang: go
file: CWE-1236-safe.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1236 mitigated: dangerous leading characters prefixed before CSV export.

import (
	"encoding/csv"
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Feedback struct {
	ID      uint
	Comment string
}

func sanitizeCSVField(value string) string {
	if value == "" {
		return value
	}
	switch value[0] {
	case '=', '+', '-', '@', '\t', '\r':
		return "'" + value
	default:
		return value
	}
}

func ExportFeedbackCSVSafe(db *gorm.DB) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		var rows []Feedback
		if err := db.Find(&rows).Error; err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		var b strings.Builder
		w := csv.NewWriter(&b)
		_ = w.Write([]string{"id", "comment"})
		for _, row := range rows {
			_ = w.Write([]string{
				strconv.FormatUint(uint64(row.ID), 10),
				sanitizeCSVField(row.Comment),
			})
		}
		w.Flush()
		c.Header("Content-Type", "text/csv")
		c.String(http.StatusOK, b.String())
	}
}
